abilities.name: Demise (Frozen Heart)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, it may make an Ice Pillar or Scheme marker within 1".

abilities.name: Punish the Gluttonous
abilities.text: Enemy models within 6" with friendly Hunger tokens cannot draw cards.

abilities.name: Tundra Hunter
abilities.text: While within 2" of a friendly Ice Pillar marker, this model receives a (+) to all duels.

actions.name: Gnawing Emptiness
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target has a friendly Hunger token, it suffers a (-) to resist this attack.

triggers.name: Devastating Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, reduce this action's raise value to 3.

triggers.name: Desperation
triggers.text: Target must discard a card or gain a Hunger token.

actions.name: Resupply
actions.effects: Draw up to two cards from this model's discard pile with values of 1-5.

actions.name: Starving Advance
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a marker.
actions.effects: Place this model in base contact with the target, then remove the target.
